jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Shiprocket
jsonLd.description:
Shiprocket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
